Compliance.description: PPRA registered with FFC; claims Rental Housing Act/FIC/CPA compliance. Past 2020 probe, 2025 FIC reporting sanction (appealed, remedied). Solid licensing but incidents deduct points.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Mixed-negative; complaints on HelloPeter/ComplaintsBoard (1.4/5 avg, low resolution) focus on letting issues like deposits/maintenance.

Product Value.description: Full-service letting but value questioned in reviews due to service issues offsetting comprehensive offerings.

Innovation.description: Website marketing, VR for sales, Alchemy CRM; no dedicated letting app or advanced letting tech found. Awards for marketing/digital.

Customer Support.description: Agent/office support for maintenance/leases; reviews cite slow responses, poor resolution. No 24/7 digital channels noted.

Accessibility & Security.description: Website accessible; POPIA compliant (notified on 2025 cyber breach compromising contacts/ID, no financials affected). Recent security incident impacts score.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Typically 8-12% monthly rent + VAT for management (industry norm; no 2025 specifics published)

socialSentiment.summary: Negative on review sites (deposits/service); no strong positive recent social data.
